apis: Akari 125mm Velcro Pad for 5 inch angle grinders. M10 thread. High-quality hook and loop backing for quick disc changes.
Akari 125mm Velcro Pad for 5 inch angle grinders. M14 thread. Professional grade for automotive and wood polishing.
Akari Black GC (Green Silicon Carbide) Wheel, 4 inch (100mm). Ideal for grinding non-ferrous metals and masonry.
Akari 4 Inch Diamond Polishing Pad For Marble & Granite 100Mm
Professional diamond polishing pad for marble and granite. 100mm diameter. Long-lasting and high gloss finish.
Akari 4 inch flap disc for metal grinding and finishing. Durable zirconia alumina abrasive grains.
Akari 4 Inch Flap Disc 100Mm Metal Colar
Akari 4 inch flap disc with reinforced metal collar for added safety and stability during heavy use.
Akari White Alumina (WA) Wheel, 4 inch. Specifically designed for sharpening high-speed steel tools.
Akari 4 Inch Non-Woven Pad For Marble & Granite 100Mm
Non-woven polishing pad for marble and granite surface conditioning and light polishing.
Akari 4 Inch Velcro Diamond Polishing Pad For Marble & Granite 100Mm
Premium velcro-backed diamond polishing pad. High diamond concentration for professional finishing.
Akari 5 inch fiber disc for heavy-duty metal removal and weld blending.
Akari 5 inch flap disc. Ideal for larger surface areas and faster stock removal.
Akari 5 Inch Sand Paper With Velcro 125Mm
Akari 5 inch velcro sand paper for wood and metal finishing. Available in various grits.
Akari 5 Inch Velcro Pad 125Mm M10 Without Foam
Hard velcro pad (without foam) for 5 inch grinders. M10 thread. Best for flat surface sanding.
Akari 5 Inch Velcro Pad 125Mm M14 Without Foam
Hard velcro pad (without foam) for 5 inch grinders. M14 thread. Professional heavy-duty application.
Akari 6mm thick depressed center (DC) grinding wheel. Black color, reinforced for safety.
Akari 6mm brown DC wheel. High performance for stainless steel and alloy grinding.
Akari 6mm green DC wheel. Optimized for non-ferrous metals and precision grinding.
Akari Double Net Black Cut Off Wheel
Double net reinforced black cut-off wheel for metal cutting. Fast and clean cuts.
Akari Double Net Green Cut Off Wheel
Double net reinforced green cut-off wheel. Specifically designed for cool cutting and long life.
Akari Double Net Magic (3 Color) Cut Off Wheel
Magic 3-color series cut-off wheel. Ultra-thin for precision cutting of metal sheets.
